volume.source: Ahrefs Free Keyword Generator (US), 2026-07-14, operator-authenticated session: screen size calculator = >1000 (KD Hard, 112 ideas). Original main keyword monitor size calculator = >100 (fails floor alone) — pivot recorded in g1-evidence.md. Value 1000 = conservative floor of the >1000 bucket.

serp.notes: Screen Size Calculator — Ranked #1 in the observed SERP for 'monitor size calculator'. Snippet: enter any known screen dimension (cm/inches) and the others are calculated. Direct HTTPS fetch failed with a certificate mismatch (cert is for *.kasserver.com, a German shared-hosting provider), indicating a dated, cheaply hosted, poorly maintained site with misconfigured SSL.

Screen Size Calculator - Omni Calculator — Page on a large, entrenched branded calculator portal. Fetched: inputs are aspect ratio (preset/custom), diagonal, flat/curved toggle; outputs width, height, area, plus curved-screen depth. Authored content with named PhD authors and reviewers, substantial explanatory text. Notably lacks PPI in the main tool (only linked as a separate calculator).

Projector Calculator | Screen Size Calculator | Aspect Ratio Calculator - ProjectorScreen.com — Projector-screen retailer hosting a bundle of calculators (aspect ratio, screen size, distance). Oriented to projector buyers, not computer-monitor shoppers; commercial page, tangential intent match for 'monitor size calculator'.

Multi-Monitor Calculator — Exact-match-domain dedicated tool, but focused on planning multi-monitor layouts (drag/rearrange monitors, wallpaper preview) with PPI calculations. Niche angle rather than a simple diagonal-to-dimensions calculator; serves a different sub-intent.

Free Screen Size Calculator - Optimize Your Viewing Experience — Calculator page on an AV-integration software company's site (lead-gen adjacent). From snippet, a generic embedded screen size calculator with marketing copy; not a dedicated tool brand, limited depth discernible.

Visual TV Size Comparison : Display Wars — Fetched: visual side-by-side size comparison of two displays (size + aspect ratio inputs, graphical overlay output). Dated design with basic HTML forms and minimal styling; mobile responsiveness only recently added. No PPI, no area breakdown, minimal explanatory content.

Screen size calculator - toolstud.io — Fetched: one-developer toolbox site maintained since 2006 (footer shows v2.5.38, 2006-2024). Functionally the deepest: diagonal + resolution in, outputs width/height/area, aspect ratio, DPI, and four viewing-distance recommendations, plus FAQ. Utilitarian engineer-style design, desktop-oriented navigation, no comparison feature.

Screen Size Calculator - See Thru Displays — Calculator page on a transparent-display manufacturer's site. Snippet indicates diagonal + aspect ratio to dimensions with inch-to-mm conversion; a supporting utility page for the company's products, not a destination tool.

Computer Laboratory - Projects: Display resolution calculator — Academic page from University of Cambridge Computer Laboratory research project. High-authority .ac.uk domain but an old research-project page, not a polished consumer tool; ranks on authority rather than UX.

Screen Size Calculator | Pro Display — Calculator page on a UK display manufacturer's site; utility page supporting product sales. Limited depth discernible from snippet; commercial context rather than a dedicated tool brand.

estimates: supporting-keyword volume notes in keyword-research.json are all [ESTIMATE]
exact volumes above the >1000 / >100 buckets not shown by free tool — bucket floors used

scoring_notes.C: TWO-PASS per P-01 ambiguity rule. First pass (adversarial-conservative): 2 — evidence torn between weak incumbents (3) and one entrenched portal at position 2 (Omni). Second pass (rubric-literal, cap at 3): the 3-bucket 'dedicated but weak/ugly incumbents' matches positions 1 (broken HTTPS cert on #1!), 4 (different sub-intent), 6 (dated basic-HTML), 7 (2006-era toolbox); the 0-bucket requires SERP domination by a branded incumbent — Omni holds one slot with a GENERIC screen-size page lacking PPI, monitor presets, and comparison. Final C=3 (capped). Both passes recorded for G2 human review.
scoring_notes.D: 3 (re-scored from 5 after keyword pivot) — domain monitorsizecalculator.com is keyword+modifier for pivoted main keyword screen size calculator; remains exact-match for primary supporting keyword. D-11 price verified: Rs 1,025.86 first year < Rs 1,200 cap (Namecheap, 2026-07-14).
scoring_notes.M: 3 — consumer electronics CPM tier (plan tier 3-4, conservative pick); general audience, no dev-adblock deduction.
scoring_notes.B: 5 — pure client-side math, no dataset, no sensors.
scoring_notes.R: 5 — no YMYL, no data-accuracy liability, thin-content risk mitigated by 600-word copy + 7 landing pages plan.

gate_g2.human_approval: operator message 2026-07-14: 'i approve the spec plan'
gate_g2.keyword_map_amendment: main keyword pivot applied post-approval per G1 data; see g1-evidence.md
